description:
Join us on Wednesday, June 10, from 4-7 PM at Whispering Vine South Creek for a Jeff Runquist tasting featuring four California reds across Zinfandel, Petite Sirah, Barbera and Cabernet Franc.

Tasting Fee: $25 per person (Buy a bottle from the tasting and your fee is refunded)

Featured Wines:

  • Jeff Runquist "R" Zinfandel 2023 - $26.99 - Blackberry, black raspberry, briary fruit and toasted oak with a generous, smooth finish.
  • Jeff Runquist "R" Petite Sirah 2024 - $30.99 - Blackberry, plum, cassis, cocoa and baking spice with rounded tannins and a full body.
  • Jeff Runquist "R" Barbera 2024 - $26.99 - Red cherry, raspberry, blueberry and spice with bright acidity and a lively finish.
  • Jeff Runquist "R" Cabernet Franc 2024 - $28.99 - Black cherry, raspberry, violet and subtle pepper with a smooth, savory finish.

Come explore Jeff Runquist Wines and find your favorite bottle. Buy a bottle and your tasting is free.
title: Jeff Runquist Tasting
